title: Map stdlib functions
description:
Create new file pkg/stdlib/map_ops.go with 12 map operations.

Add resolveMap helper (checks Tag==TagObj, TypeID==ObjMap, asserts *MapObj).

Implement these functions following the exact signatures and error handling in goal spec sections 3.1-3.12:
- MapNew: 0 args, returns heap.AllocMap()
- MapGet: 2 args (map, key), errors on missing key with "key not found: <key>"
- MapSet: 3 args (map, key, value), mutates in place, returns same map
- MapDelete: 2 args, mutates in place, silent on missing key
- MapContains: 2 args, returns BoolVal
- MapLen: 1 arg, returns IntVal(m.Count)
- MapKeys: 1 arg, returns array of keys via heap.AllocArray
- MapValues: 1 arg, returns array of values
- MapEntries: 1 arg, returns array of (key, value) tuples via AllocTuple
- MapMerge: 2 args, creates NEW map, copies m1 then m2 entries (m2 wins)
- MapFilter: 2 args (map, predicate), uses CallbackInvoker, returns NEW map
- MapMapValues: 2 args (map, transform), uses CallbackInvoker, returns NEW map

All functions follow the BuiltinFunc signature: func(args []vm.Value, heap *vm.Heap) (vm.Value, error)
